args.summary: User needs to delete all their current tasks. This is not possible to do with the tools available.
User wants to change my upcoming one stop flight from ATL to LAX within reservation XEWRD9 to a nonstop flight from ATL to LAS (Las Vegas). Origin and destination of a reservation cannot be modified.
The user wants to refund each order to the opposite order's payment method, but the agent cannot help.
The user prefers PayPal for refund, but the agent cannot help.
The user wants to refund to the amex credit card, but the agent cannot help.

The user urgently needs to undo a cancellation of an order and insists on receiving the items from the initial order as soon as possible. The user acknowledges the policy but requests exceptional measures due to the urgency of the situation.
Customer is asking about how to set up a travel notification for their Platinum Rewards Card before traveling to Japan. I was unable to find information about this process in the knowledge base.

args.summary: Customer Marcus Chen-Ramirez requested to close 4 credit cards. Green Rewards Card was closed (had prior retention attempt so not eligible for retention). EcoCard could not be closed due to pending replacement card in transit - customer disputed this but system shows card not yet delivered. Gold Rewards Card could not be closed due to $175 outstanding balance and insufficient checking funds ($50) - customer claimed to have made a payment but no payment was received. Crypto-Cash Back - customer wanted to close due to annual fee, offered downgrade which was refused, applied $5 statement credit as retention offer which customer accepted. Customer frustrated with experience and requested transfer to human agent.

args.address: 3178 Harbor View Drive, San Diego, CA 92101
